main.description: A signed philosophical claim about a subject (project, person, artifact).

subject.description: URI of the thing being claimed about. Common schemes: github:owner/repo, at://did:.../...

predicate.description: The relation, e.g. embodiesPhilosophy, refutesPhilosophy, alignsWith.

object.description: URI of the philosophy or counterparty, e.g. org.openlore.philosophy.memory-safety.

evidence.description: Zero or more evidence URIs supporting the claim.

confidence.description: Numeric only; display buckets are NEVER persisted (WD-10 / OD-2).

author.description: Author DID + key fragment, e.g. did:plc:jeff#org.openlore.application.

composedAt.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp captured at compose-time (NOT sign-time).

cid.description: Target claim's CID; MUST NOT be self-reference.

references.description: Zero or more typed references to other claims. See ADR-008.

alg.description: Signature algorithm; Ed25519 only for slice-01.

sig.description: Base64url-encoded signature over the unsigned-claim CID (per ADR-006).
